hero.headline:
Build and deploy
your ideas.
hero.subheading: We design, brand, and engineer digital products from concept to production. Strategy that ships.

services.label: Services
services.title: Your product, delivered.
services.description: From the first sketch to production deploy. We handle the full spectrum so you can focus on what matters.

items.title: Branding & Identity
items.description: Naming, visual identity, brand systems, and guidelines that make your product instantly recognizable.

items.title: Product Design
items.description: UX research, UI design, design systems, and prototyping. Interfaces that feel inevitable, not designed.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Full-stack engineering with modern frameworks. React, Next.js, Node — performant, accessible, scalable.

items.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
items.description: GCP, AWS, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and DevOps. Your product runs smooth at any scale.

items.title: AI Integration
items.description: LLM agents, conversational AI, intelligent workflows. We bring AI from hype to production.

items.title: Strategy & Consulting
items.description: Product strategy, technical audits, and roadmap planning. Make the right decisions before writing code.

story.quote: We believe great products come from clear thinking and honest craft. No fluff, no over-engineering — just ideas built with intention and shipped with confidence.

values.title: Ship, don't slide
values.description: We build real products, not pitch decks. Every engagement produces working software.

values.title: Opinionated by default
values.description: Strong decisions made early save months later. We bring a point of view to every project.

values.title: Built to last
values.description: Clean architecture, deterministic systems, engineering standards. Your codebase should outlive the hype.

cta.title: Ready to build something?
cta.description: Tell us about your project. We'll figure out the rest.

contact.heading:
Let's build
something together.
contact.description: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 48 hours. No sales pitch, just a real conversation.
contact.originText: Proudly crafted from Andorra — small country, serious engineering.

form.messagePlaceholder: What are you building? What problem are you solving?

meta.title: Nord Studio · Digital Products from Andorra
meta.description: We design, brand, and engineer digital products from concept to production.
